release: StockPair App v0.9.0 multi-chain and DAO intelligence extension
packagePurpose: Reproducible StockPair source extension with configured-EVM-chain health and discovery, DAO/governance and dormancy evidence, indexed liquidity and activity intelligence, bounded direct-RPC fallback, and reviewed-hash-gated user-signed execution.

scout.limitation: Coverage is complete only for configured RPC/archive endpoints and indexed block ranges. Public labels are evidence records, not private identity claims. Pending visibility requires a provider that exposes pending transactions.

externalGates: No hosted indexer provider deployment was executed.
No Robinhood mainnet or testnet contract deployment was executed.
No external DEX adapter was production-enabled or live-traded.
No first real-value StockPair market was created.
Independent smart-contract, economic, frontend, infrastructure and legal/compliance review remains mandatory.
Persistent database/reorg recovery, provider SLAs and physical-device browser testing remain external production gates.
verification.excludedScope: Stake Engine reference was accidental and is not part of this release.

cleanInstallRetest.detail: The isolated npm ci process stalled and was terminated. No fresh clean-install pass is claimed for this extension.

limitations: All-chain coverage means only explicitly configured EVM chains backed by reliable archive/history providers and persistent checkpoints.
Dormancy and abandoned-DAO results are evidence-based candidates, not ownership, recoverability, legal status, or permission to use assets.
Scanner and AI-style auditor outputs are deterministic heuristics and external evidence summaries, not security guarantees.
Execution remains non-custodial, user-reviewed and wallet-signed.
